summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #473 in the moltis repo, including log level changes, field cleanup, and unit tests, then resolve all review conversations.
summary.outcome: All review threads resolved: downgraded warn! to info! for sticker/reaction/poll events, removed already-handled fields from describe_message_fields, added 3 unit tests, and updated docs to match the new log level.

repo: Logging guidelines distinguish between unexpected system events (warn) and common user actions (info) — stickers, reactions, and polls fall into the latter category.
describe_message_fields is used for logging unhandled fields; fields already dispatched by classify_message should be excluded to avoid misleading output.
Documentation lives in docs/src/whatsapp.md and must stay in sync with code-level log levels.

code.finding: Referenced warn-level logging that was changed to info! in code; required a follow-up doc fix after the initial PR review round.

workflow: PR review threads can be resolved via GitHub API after addressing each comment; resolving all threads signals review completion.
A second pass over the PR after the initial fix round caught a doc/code mismatch that was missed in the first round.

friction: A doc/code inconsistency (warn vs info in whatsapp.md) was not caught in the first fix pass and required a second review cycle to identify and resolve.
